data.title: Safe Bulkers, Inc. Announces Availability of 2025 Sustainability Report
data.description: In Monaco on May 29, 2026, Safe Bulkers, Inc. (NYSE: SB), a global company offering marine drybulk transportation services, released its 2025 Sustainability Report. This report is now accessible for download on the company's website.

data.title: REDESIGNED STIIIZY CARTRIDGE APPROVED BY FEDERAL AGENCY
data.description: As of May 29, 2026, STIIIZY has received clearance for the purchase and sale of their newly designed cartridges by retailers. The U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) has confirmed that the redesigned cartridges do not violate any of PAX Lab's patents. This ruling allows the company to proceed with selling the cartridges without any legal restrictions. The clearance opens up opportunities for retailers to offer the redesigned cartridges, resulting in potential increased sales and market access for STIIIZY.

data.title: Celebrate World Digestive Health Day With Gundry MD Bio Complete 3, A Unique Supplement That Is Redefining Gut Health Support
data.description: A cutting-edge daily digestive health formula containing prebiotics, probiotics, and postbiotics has been introduced by Gundry MD®, in celebration of World Digestive Health Day. This supplement, known as Gundry MD Bio..., combines all three components into one powerful blend. The product has gained significant popularity among consumers for its comprehensive approach to gut health. The innovative formula aims to promote digestive wellness by providing a holistic solution for maintaining a healthy gut.

data.title: Creative Visions Announces 2026 #CreateConnectCare Awards Honoring Youth Mental Health Storytellers Around the World
data.description: In a time of diminishing youth mental health resources, the #CreateConnectCare Awards by Creative Visions shine a light on outstanding young artists, writers, creators, and educators who are fostering environments of care in classrooms globally. Held in Los Angeles on May 29, 2026, this initiative celebrates the efforts of these individuals in promoting mental wellness and support among youth.

data.title: THIRDREALITY Launches Smart Presence Sensor R2, Bringing Flexible Battery-Powered Presence Detection to Everyday Smart Homes
data.description: Today, a leading smart home brand, THIRDREALITY, introduced the THIRDREALITY Presence Sensor R2. This sensor operates on battery power and utilizes 24GHz mmWave technology. It is specifically engineered to streamline the implementation of dependable presence-driven automation across homes.

data.title: TuningBot Challenges the Prepaid-Credit Model With Transparent Pay-Per-File ECU Services
data.description: TuningBot is promoting its clear pay-per-file model as an alternative to prepaid-credit packages, aiding professional tuners and workshops in confirming services before purchase. This system is intended to enhance transparency, ensuring that supported services are verified in advance. The company, based in London, emphasizes this approach to streamline operations for users. This news was released on May 29, 2026.

data.title: Factor 8 Named a Leader in G2's Summer 2026 Reports for Sales Training and Sales Consulting
data.description: Factor 8 is excited to share that it has been recognized in G2's Summer 2026 Reports as a Leader in Sales Training and Sales Consulting. The acknowledgement was made public on May 29, 2026, in Phoenix. This achievement highlights Factor 8's strong presence in the industry, showcasing its expertise and excellence. The report solidifies Factor 8's position as a top performer, underscoring its commitment to delivering high-quality services.

data.title: Trajan Announces Commercial Release of HDExaminer PRO at ASMS 2026
data.description: The latest version of the software, Version 1.0, enhances the HDX-MS analysis process, providing a faster and more secure experience. The update includes workflow improvements, performance optimization, and better support for mutant analysis. These additions build on collaborative efforts aimed at advancing HDX-MS workflows. The software update was released on May 29, 2026, from RINGWOOD, Australia.

data.title: Flashpoint Launches Priority Intelligence Requirements (PIRs) to Bring Alignment and Measurability to Threat Intelligence Operations
data.description: The latest Flashpoint Ignite feature aids intelligence teams in translating General Intelligence Requirements and Priority Intelligence Requirements into actionable tasks by integrating business priorities, monitoring activities, conducting investigations, and achieving measurable operational goals through a consolidated workflow. This enhancement streamlines the intelligence process, optimizing efficiency and effectiveness.

data.title: Annum Housing Launches in Southern Oregon as 56% of Workers Say Housing is Unaffordable
data.description: Making history as the inaugural region to implement the system, the Rogue Valley has unveiled a groundbreaking platform offering insights into workforce housing instability that was previously overlooked. The public launch of Annum Housing on May 29, 2026 in Medford, Oregon signifies a pivotal moment in providing real-time data on this pressing issue. This innovative technology aims to address the housing crisis by presenting communities with an accurate representation of the current state of workforce housing.

data.title: Heartwell STAT Imaging Launches Rapid-Turnaround DVT Testing in Midtown New York City and New Jersey
data.description: Heartwell STAT Imaging, a facility specializing in cardiac health services, has introduced rapid-turnaround cardiac ultrasound screenings at two designated sites. These locations are situated at 26 E. 36th Street in Midtown Manhattan and 18 Centre Drive in Monroe Township, New Jersey. This initiative, led by cardiologists, aims to cater to the urgent need for efficient cardiac care.

data.title: Fast Company Impact Council Annual Meeting to Convene With Top Leaders From Accenture Song, Carnegie, and TBWA\Chiat\Day NY to Explore Future of American Innovation
data.description: On June 2, 2026, Fast Company, the exclusive media brand focusing on the convergence of business, innovation, and design, will conduct its yearly Impact Council gathering at Grace Farms in New Canaan, Connecticut. The event will take place in New York, with the exact location disclosed closer to the date.

data.title: The Black Man's Health Festival® Returns to Brooklyn for 5th Year
data.description: The upcoming Black Man's Health Festival® 2026 will be held in Brooklyn on June 6, 2026. This event will offer a variety of wellness activities, screenings, performances, and community-focused care, all free of charge. Taking place in Brooklyn, New York, this festival aims to cater to the health needs of Black men and the wider community. This initiative by Heart, Body & Soul, Inc. is set to provide a day filled with enriching experiences for attendees.
Managerial employees and close associates of Genmab A/S made transactions involving shares and linked securities. #finance #trading

data.title: QXO Announces Cash Tender Offers and Consent Solicitations for Any and All of TopBuild Corp.’s 4.125% Senior Notes due 2032 and 5.625% Senior Notes due 2034
data.description: In Greenwich, Connecticut, QXO, Inc. disclosed its plan to acquire TopBuild Corp., commencing tender offers through its subsidiary Titanium MergerCo, Inc., to buy all outstanding 4.125% Senior Notes due 2032 and 5.625% Senior Notes due 2034. The offer includes purchasing any and all of the 2032 Notes and 2034 Notes for cash. This move comes following the announcement made by QXO on the NYSE (QXO) regarding the pending acquisition.

data.title: WIF may hit $0.24 or drop to $0.15 in 10 days. Whales collecting at critical $0.20 level amid selling pressure.
data.description: Dogwifhat is currently at a crucial point as whales continue to accumulate despite facing strong selling pressure. The resistance level of $0.20 will play a key role in determining whether WIF reaches the target price of $0.24 or experiences a decline to $0.15.

data.title: PEPE forecast: Oversold bounce seen, targets 20% rally in 2 weeks. Trades at RSI 34.16, with support at $0.18. 65% chance of reaching $0.00000850-$0.00000900.
data.description: PEPE is currently trading at an RSI level of 34.16, indicating oversold conditions, and is closely positioned near Bollinger Band support at 0.18. Based on technical analysis, there is a 65% chance of a relief rally towards the range of $0.00000850 to $0.00000900.

data.title: Expect a potential $0.15 breakout or $0.10 retest for OP in 7 days. Whales buy at $0.12, RSI 38.84. 65% chance of reaching resistance.
data.description: Positive sentiment is currently at $0.12 with significant holders increasing their positions, even as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains neutral at 38.84. There is a 65% chance of reaching the $0.15 resistance level in the next week. However, a failure to breach this resistance could lead to a rapid decline towards the $0.10 support level.

data.title: Technical breakdown in ARB accelerates, $0.075 target predicted. Expected 20-25% decline in 4-6 weeks to $0.075-$0.08 support levels.
data.description: The current position of ARB below all major moving averages indicates ongoing weakness expected towards the support levels of $0.075-$0.08. Momentum indicators suggest a potential decline of 20-25% over the next 4-6 weeks. This downward trend is anticipated as Layer 2 technologies continue to influence the market.

data.title: Recursion Reports Grant of Inducement Awards as Permitted by the Nasdaq Listing Rules
data.description: On May 26, 2026, Recursion, a renowned clinical stage TechBio company, revealed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned the provision of inducement restricted stock unit (RSU) awards. These awards encompassed 2,991,840 shares of its class A common stock, distributed among 33 fresh recruits. This action was taken under Recursion's 2024 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. Each award was given as an inducement pivotal to the initiation of employment with Recursion or its subsidiary, in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
